Sends a discovery signal that locks the scanner onto a nearby deposit of selected type.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_resonance.name: §dFaint Resonance
create_rns.catalyst.faint_resonance.desc: Achieved by attaching 2 or more resonators of any type to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.resonance.name: §dResonance
create_rns.catalyst.resonance.descriptio: Achieved by attaching 4 or more resonators of any type to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_shattering_res: Achieved by attaching 2 or more shattering resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.shattering_resonance: Achieved by attaching 4 or more shattering resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.faint_stabilizing_re: Achieved by attaching 2 or more stabilizing resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.stabilizing_resonanc: Achieved by attaching 4 or more stabilizing resonators to a miner.
create_rns.catalyst.overclock.name: §6Overclocked
create_rns.catalyst.overclock.descriptio: Achieved by attaching a fluid container to a miner and filling it with lava. Lava is be consumed while the miner is working.

create_rns.gui.assembly.exception.drill_: Drill head is not aligned with the bearing.

create_rns.jei.item_in_group: One of %1$s items in a group
create_rns.ponder.shared.mining_infinite: Deposit blocks contain infinite resources that cannot be simply mined by hand
create_rns.ponder.shared.mining_finite: Deposit blocks contain resources that cannot be simply mined by hand
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_1: Miner bearings create contraptions used for mining
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_2: Each miner contraption must have exactly one drill head directly underneath in order to function
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_3: When assembled, the miner claims deposit blocks below in a certain area
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_4: Each deposit block can only be claimed by a single miner
create_rns.ponder.mining.text_5: While some items can be mined without additional attachments...
create_rns.ponder.extracting.text_1: Miners work best when running continuously without interruptions
create_rns.ponder.extracting.text_2: Adding a portable interface can significantly slow them down
create_rns.ponder.extracting.text_3: Controlling interfaces with redstone is key to maximize efficiency
